subject: Mareep, the electric sheep Pokemon, resting in a pastoral meadow setting
description: A single Mareep is shown in a mid-shot, curled or settled low against a bright pastoral background of open meadow and sky. The creature's body is dominated by large fluffy cream-colored wool, with blue stripes visible on its face and legs. Its distinctive orb-tipped tail is visible. The palette is warm yellows and creams in the foreground against a light blue sky background. The mood is calm and cozy.
foreground: Mareep with large fluffy wool body settled low, blue striped face and legs visible, orb-tipped tail
background: Open meadow or pasture with light blue sky
emotion: calm and settled, restful body posture
